hero.tagline: Software engineer focused on backend systems, AI agents, and polished frontends. Every project is a calculated move — precise, purposeful, powerful.

about.description1: I'm Renaldo, a software engineer who treats every problem like a chess match — studying the board, thinking several moves ahead, and executing with precision.
about.description2: My work spans from robust backend systems and intelligent AI agents to polished, performant frontends. I thrive where complex systems meet elegant user experiences.

skills.description: Every piece has a unique power. My skills are no different — each stack plays a distinct, vital role.
skills.rooksDesc: Rock-solid backends that hold the board together. APIs, databases, cloud infrastructure — the foundation of every system.
skills.knightsDesc: Knights move in unexpected ways — so do AI systems. Building autonomous agents, pipelines, and smart automation.
skills.bishopsDesc: Diagonal thinking for frontend. Fast, beautiful, interactive experiences that make users feel something.

projects.p1Desc: Autonomous agent that manages complex scheduling, resolves conflicts, and learns from user patterns using LLMs.
projects.p2Desc: High-throughput event processing pipeline with live dashboards serving 100k+ events/day without breaking a sweat.
projects.p3Desc: Scalable, accessible component library powering multiple products. Zero external dependencies.
projects.p4Desc: RAG-powered API that extracts, classifies, and answers questions from enterprise documents at scale.

timeline.e1Desc: Built the foundation. Mastered core web technologies, shipped first production systems.
timeline.e2Desc: Academic research, complex system design, distributed systems and AI fundamentals.
timeline.e3Desc: Led product development from zero to production. Built AI automation and scalable APIs.
timeline.e4Desc: Building intelligent systems at the frontier of AI and software. Agents, automation, high-impact products.

contact.description: Have a project in mind? Looking for a strategic engineer? Make your move — I respond within 24 hours.
contact.successText: Excellent move. I'll respond within 24 hours.
